3040800.name: Hardest Game About Jumping
3040800.description:
Every jump is a test of skill, and every landing must be perfect. The path ahead is unforgiving, with slippery edges, tight landings, and heart-pounding leaps between platforms.

Misstep? You fall. Hard. But those who endure will find victory, glory, and the ultimate test of mastery.

Will you bounce your way to triumph, or will the pogo break your spirit?

GET READY!

This journey will test your patience, precision, and perseverance. As you bounce your way through impossible heights and brutal obstacles, you may experience a CHANGED LIFE—one that teaches you the art of resilience, the pain of failure, and the unmatched joy of mastering the impossible.

Have Fun With:

  • Physics based Pogo Stick Jumping.

  • Brutally addictive gameplay: Every jump is a risk, every landing a challenge. One mistake? Start over.

  • Meticulously designed obstacles: No randomness, no hand-holding—just pure skill-based platforming.

  • A peaceful yet punishing experience: No enemies, no death—just the constant fear of falling back to where you started.

  • Deceptively deep mechanics: Learning to pogo is easy. Mastering it? A nightmare.
    Endless suffering.

Warning!

❌ Mercy… the game doesn’t care about your frustration.

Will You Bounce to Glory?

Conquer treacherous landscapes, towering structures, and near-impossible jumps to reach the final goal. No checkpoints. No shortcuts. Just you, your pogo-stick, and the relentless pull of gravity.

Do you have the patience to bounce beyond your limits—or will frustration send you plummeting into the abyss?
3040800.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
